name: Empress Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, sift together the cake flour with ground chocolate, sugar, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
3. Add the shortening and mix in 3/4 cup of buttermilk until combined.
4. Beat on medium-low speed for 2 minutes.
5. Add the remaining 1/4 cup of buttermilk, eggs, and vanilla. Continue beating for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Line two 8-inch round cake pans with waxed paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool on wire racks for 10 minutes before removing the layers from the pans.
10. Once completely cooled, frost with Empress Frosting. (separate recipe)
